productDisplayName: Reebok Men Micro Shorts Grey and White
description: CompositionGrey and white polyester shorts with elastic waist, side pockets and embroidered brand long on left legFittingComfortWash careHand wash or machine washA perfect wear to the gym or while playing a fun game of football, these polyester shorts from reebok are designed to provide ample comfort and protection from sweat. The polyester fabric wicks away sweat and heat, allowing your skin to breathe freely while you concentrate on the game. The deep pockets on the sides provide you with ample space to stash away your essentials when on the run, while the stylishly cut white panels and the embroidered logo on the left thigh render these shorts a fashionable touch.
